name: rutherford-claude
description: Claude plugin for Rutherford — orchestrate a crew of coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Goose, and more) over the Agent Client Protocol.

plugins.name: rutherford
plugins.description: Auto-registers the Rutherford MCP server (via uvx) and ships skills, an orchestrator agent, and slash commands for setup, panels, delegation, consensus, debate, and code review.
